productDisplayName: BIBA OUTLET Women Printed Navy Blue Kurti
description: Composition Navy blue printed kurti made of lightweight 100% cotton knitted fabric with stretch, has a woven (non stretch) cotton lining, sleeveless shape, round neck with sequin and stitching embellishments on yoke, fabric gathered to yoke on front and back and hem gathered to lining to create puffed shape Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron This kurta is made of soft lightweight cotton which – along with the short sleeves, will keep you cool in warm weather. The sweet puffed shape will make you stand out in a crowd. Wear this over jeans or leggings depending on the occasion and dress it up or down with your choice of accessories. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
